hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.sh$' && command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then shellcheck "$file" 2>&1 || true; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '(config\.env|\.credentials|\.pem|\.key|\.crt)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Sensitive file — do not edit secrets/certs directly' >&2; exit 2; fi
